original_query: select    min(s_store_name)   ,min(s_company_id)   ,min(s_street_number)   ,min(s_street_name)   ,min(s_suite_number)   ,min(s_city)   ,min(s_zip)   ,min(ss_ticket_number)   ,min(ss_sold_date_sk)   ,min(sr_returned_date_sk)   ,min(ss_item_sk)   ,min(d1.d_date_sk) from    store_sales   ,store_returns   ,store   ,date_dim d1   ,date_dim d2 where     d2.d_moy = 2 and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_sold_date_sk   = d1.d_date_sk and sr_returned_date_sk   = d2.d_date_sk and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk and sr_store_sk = s_store_sk and d1.d_date between (d2.d_date - interval '120' day)                and d2.d_date and d1.d_dow = 4 and s_state in ('MI','NC','WI')  ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    min(s_store_name),
    min(s_company_id),
    min(s_street_number),
    min(s_street_name),
    min(s_suite_number),
    min(s_city),
    min(s_zip),
    min(ss_ticket_number),
    min(ss_sold_date_sk),
    min(sr_returned_date_sk),
    min(ss_item_sk),
    min(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM
    store_sales
    JOIN store_returns ON 
        ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
        AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
        AND ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk
        AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    JOIN store ON
        ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON
        ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON
        sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE
    d2.d_moy = 2
    AND d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - interval '120' day) AND d2.d_date
    AND d1.d_dow = 4
    AND s_state IN ('MI','NC','WI');

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Add explicit JOIN conditions between store_sales and store_returns on ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk to reduce the number of rows early in the join process.
Remove redundant sr_store_sk = s_store_sk condition since it's already implied by ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk.
Replace implicit comma-separated joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially helping the optimizer.
